NUMEROUS TREES DOWN AROUND THE AREA, IMPACTING MULTIPLE CAMP SITES. NUMEROUS ROADS COMPLETELY BLOCKED BY FALLEN TREES. NO INJURIES REPORTED AT THE TIME OF THE REPORT. TIME ESTIMATED VIA RADAR.

EYE WITNESS RECORDED TORNADO SKIPPING OFF THE LAKE BEFORE SETTING DOWN OFFSHORE OF EAST STAR LAKE CAMPGROUND. THE TORNADO DOWNED NUMEROUS TREES AND POWER LINES ON ITS WAY ACROSS THE CAMPSITE AND CONTINUED FOR 6 MILES NORTHEAST BEFORE DISSIPATING NEAR THE BUCKTABON SPRINGS STATE NATURAL AREA. NO INJURIES OR FATALITIES REPORTED.
